name: Plague
flavor: Place on target location. All units at this location and adjacent locations get -2 strength. Discarded when the location is removed from the grid.

name: Golden Age
text: You gain +1 gold per turn for 3 turns.
flavor: The coffers overflow and the people rejoice.

name: Ambush
text: When an enemy unit enters this location: injure that unit.

name: Diplomatic Summit
text: All Diplomat units get +2 charisma for 1 turn.

name: Earthquake
text: Remove target location from the grid. All units there are injured. Replacement is drawn.

name: Renaissance
text: All your Scientist units get +2 cunning for 3 turns.
flavor: The world woke up and started asking questions.

name: Arms Race
text: All your Warrior units get +2 strength for 2 turns.
flavor: Build faster. Build stronger. Build more.

name: Sabotage
text: When an enemy unit at this location uses an action: cancel the action. Discard after triggering.
flavor: The gears were not supposed to stop.

name: Trade Embargo
text: Target opponent's market purchases cost 2 more gold for 2 turns.

name: Assassination Attempt
text: When an enemy unit enters this location: if that unit's strength is 6 or less kill it.
flavor: History turns on a single blade.

name: Forced March
text: Move up to 2 of your units to adjacent locations.
